name: The Backrooms: Escape
short_description: The Backrooms: Escape is an experience in the liminal world of backrooms. Move freely, explore the secrets of the corporation, but remember - you are not alone.
detailed_description:
You - find recordings on which a person unknown to you is in a [CLASSIFIED], mysterious place. Who knows what these old tapes are hiding.

The recording takes place in [CLASSIFIED], when Sonax employees hire people to conduct so-called tests on the territory [CLASSIFIED]. All this is in the name of progress and science. After several studies in [CLASSIFIED], the company lost many scientific employees. The research was stopped, and the project was classified…


Embark on a mysterious world Behind the Scenes. Explore different locations (Liminal Space, Backroom Levels).

In the game you will get into the most popular Backrooms levels and will be able to explore them. At each level, you will find different ways to escape and dangers on the way. Find a way to leave this place.

Beautiful graphics, minimal user interface and gloomy atmosphere will ensure immersion in the game.

Be careful, falling out of reality is the most common way to get into Backrooms.

supported_languages:
English*, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, French, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
